strengths: 18+ years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, infrastructure, and emerging AI systems
Recent hands-on experience with AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates current technical engagement
Founder of GISCollective and strong track record of technical leadership at Staff/Senior levels
concerns: Only 6 months of AI-specific experience; no demonstrated track record building AI products, platforms, or research
No Master's or PhD in AI/ML; lacks advanced degree in AI despite strong preference for the role
No evidence of strategic AI thought leadership, industry visibility, or ability to advise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption
response.justification: Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with strong fundamentals and 18+ years of experience across diverse domains. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep, demonstrated expertise in AI strategy—advising on future state, identifying differentiation opportunities, and inspiring others through recognized AI thought leadership. His recent AI infrastructure work is promising but too nascent and narrowly scoped. He appears to be a strong Senior/Staff engineer seeking growth, but lacks the specialized AI focus, strategic positioning, and proven domain leadership this Director-level role demands.
